zh.lifeSummary: Marie De Harcourt於大約1252年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯坦頓 武朋 海因 希斯。她與Thierry Du Chasteler結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1282年在比利時海瑙特阿斯姆爾白可享年32歲，埋葬在比利時海瑙特阿斯姆爾白可。

nameMeanings.name: Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Marie De Harcourt was born about 1252, in Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Thierry Du Chasteler. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1282, in Moulbaix, Ath, Hainaut, Belgium, at the age of 32, and was buried in Moulbaix, Ath, Hainaut, Belgium.

ko.lifeSummary: Marie De Harcourt(은)는 대략 1252년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스탠턴 업 이인 히스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Thierry Du Chasteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1282년 벨기에 하인오트 앳h 모우베이스에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 하인오트 앳h 모우베이스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Marie De Harcourt родилась около 1252 г. в местности стантон упон хаин хит, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thierry Du Chasteler. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1282 г. в местности моулбеикс, ат, ханаут, Бельгия в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности моулбеикс, ат, ханаут, Бельгия.
